case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. WELLS, ARTHUR et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KIMERLING, ALLYCE SUSAN SUBSTITUTED FOR WONG, ARTHUR LANG AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS, ARTHUR ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
